name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: Tempe's TitleMax Title Loans store at 2404 N Scottsdale Rd offers quick vehicle title loans.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Loans operates a dedicated location at 2404 N Scottsdale Rd in Tempe, AZ. This standalone storefront is conveniently situated for Tempe residents needing quick title loans. The Tempe branch maintains hours Monday–Friday with extended hours: Monday 9AM–7PM, Tuesday–Thursday 9AM–6PM, Friday 9AM–7PM, Saturday 10AM–4PM, and closed Sundays.

At this Tempe location, you can obtain fast title loans based on your vehicle's value. The store accepts most vehicles with clear or lien-free titles. Contact the Tempe branch directly at +1 480-990-1875 to discuss your loan amount, terms, and approval options. Staff can answer questions about what documents you'll need and how the process works.

If you live in or near Tempe and need emergency cash quickly, TitleMax offers a straightforward process. Bring your vehicle title, valid ID, and proof of residency to complete your application. The Tempe location provides a fast alternative to traditional banks when you need same-day or next-day funding.
pros: Same-day cash disbursement for approved applicants
Keep driving your vehicle throughout the loan term
Most credit types accepted — vehicle title offsets credit risk
Three distinct product options: title pledge, secured flex LOC, and unsecured LOC
Bilingual staff available at this Memphis location
5.00/5 Google rating across 481+ reviews at this specific store
cons: Interest rates on title loans are not disclosed on the website and are typically extremely high (100–300% APR range industry-wide)
Vehicle repossession is a real consequence of default — collateral risk is significant
Online unsecured personal loans restricted to only 10 states
Closed Sundays, limiting emergency weekend access
Credit check is still required despite marketing to poor-credit borrowers
best_for: Vehicle owners with a clear (paid-off) title who need cash the same day
Borrowers with poor or thin credit history who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
Tennessee residents needing a flex line of credit with draw-as-needed flexibility
Consumers in AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, or WI seeking an online unsecured line of credit
diagnosis: TitleMax is best suited for vehicle owners with impaired credit who have exhausted other emergency cash options and need funds the same day. The central caveat is cost and collateral risk: title loans carry extremely high interest rates and defaulting puts your vehicle at risk — these are emergency products, not long-term financial solutions.
services: Car title pledge loans (secured by vehicle title)
Flex line of credit (secured, draw up to credit limit over time)
Bilingual customer service (at Summer Avenue location)
Loan management via customer portal (title loans and personal loans tracked separately)
meta_description: TitleMax Title Loans at 2404 N Scottsdale Rd, Tempe, AZ. Quick vehicle title loans with same-day funding available.
